[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] '''Inos Fonada''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] who, prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], was under the observation of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]], who inserted a spy in the admiral's command chain.

==Biography==
Following [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin's]] [[Death/Legends|death]], the [[Spy/Legends|spy]], [[Sandrex Olotho]], became Fonada's eyes and ears in the field. Fonada became a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] commanding a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], engaging in a hit-and-run campaign against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] shipping concerns. In the [[Standard month/Legends|months]] preceding the [[Thrawn campaign|Thrawn crisis]], Fonada and his fleet, mostly composed of scavenged Imperial vessels, promptly abandoned their bases in the [[Vatha sector/Legends|Vatha sector]] and disappeared down the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]], which was later reported to the New Republic. It wouldn't be revealed until a few months after the Thrawn crisis that the New Republic would learn the circumstances of why it happened, when dealing with the reborn Emperor's forces.<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>
